purpose: protect commercial launch quality by reviewing claims, data handling, proof language, and AI operating guardrails

checks.name: Claims Review
checks.goal: block fake ROI, fake testimonials, and guaranteed revenue language

checks.name: Data Handling Review
checks.goal: confirm the system asks only for data needed to deliver the agreed workflow

checks.name: AI Review Gate
checks.goal: keep AI outputs under owner review for sensitive actions

checks.name: Proof Language
checks.goal: use before/after and operational evidence instead of unsupported claims

required_guardrails: proof pack required after every paid sprint
